de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.signanalysis

Class SignAnalysisDomainElem

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.AbstractDomainElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.signanalysis.SignAnalysisDomainElem
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    Bottom, Geq, Leq, Neg, Pos, Top, Zero

    public abstract class SignAnalysisDomainElem
extends AbstractDomainElement
    A domain element for sign analysis.
